title: cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. microcalyx
intro: Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. microcalyx, also known as the small-flowered keel flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried forms for consumption, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
